headline: Will Constellation Brands’ (STZ) New McDonald’s CMO Director Reframe Its Consumer Brand Playbook?
summary: Constellation Brands recently elected Morgan Flatley, Executive Vice President, Global Chief Marketing Officer and New Business Ventures at McDonald’s, to its Board of Directors as an independent member, restoring the Board to twelve seats as part of an ongoing refresh following former CEO Bill Newlands’ retirement. Flatley’s track record leading high-impact global marketing and innovation at McDonald’s and previously at PepsiCo brings deep consumer brand-building expertise directly relevant...

headline: Is It Time To Reconsider PepsiCo (PEP) After Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether PepsiCo at around US$150.57 is offering fair value or a potential bargain, the next sections will walk through what the current price might be telling you. The stock is up 1.0% over the last week and 5.9% year to date, even though it is down 2.1% over the past month and has also declined 9.3% over three years. These moves can change how investors think about both upside and risk. Over the past year PepsiCo has returned 21.1%, and 18.9% over five years, which...

headline: HDV: This May Not Be The ETF You Want, But It Could Be The One You Need Right Now
summary: HDV offers defensive exposure with a 2.90% yield, focusing on quality, high-dividend companies with strong moats. Read more on HDV ETF here.
